description: Cross-species conservation analysis showing all UBAC2 orthologs lack catalytic residues — ancestral loss
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Data from ortholog analysis
orthologs = [
    ("Homo sapiens", "Q8NBM4", 344, "N-term only", False),
    ("Mus musculus", "Q8R1K1", 345, "N-term only", False),
    ("Rattus norvegicus", "F1LQF5", 345, "N-term only", False),
    ("Macaca fascicularis", "Q4R910", 345, "N-term only", False),
    ("Gorilla gorilla", "A0A2I2ZI95", 343, "None", False),
    ("Bos taurus", "A4FV41", 345, "N-term only", False),
    ("Canis lupus dingo", "A0A8C0LDZ8", 328, "N-term only", False),
    ("Pteropus vampyrus", "A0A6P3QE40", 345, "N-term only", False),
    ("Balaenoptera acutorostrata", "A0A384BB05", 391, "N-term only", False),
    ("Gallus gallus", "Q5ZJQ8", 344, "None", False),
    ("Taeniopygia guttata", "A0A674GWR9", 341, "None", False),
    ("Anser brachyrhynchus", "A0A8B9CMM8", 342, "None", False),
    ("Oreochromis aureus", "A0A668TT55", 353, "None", False),
]

# Create visualization
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 8))

# Y positions
y_positions = list(range(len(orthologs)-1, -1, -1))
species = [o[0] for o in orthologs]
gxsg_status = [o[3] for o in orthologs]
has_catalytic = [o[4] for o in orthologs]

# Color by taxonomic group
colors = []
groups = []
for org, *_ in orthologs:
    if org in ['Homo sapiens', 'Macaca fascicularis', 'Gorilla gorilla']:
        colors.append('#1565C0')  # Primates
        groups.append('Primates')
    elif org in ['Mus musculus', 'Rattus norvegicus', 'Peromyscus maniculatus bairdii', 'Mus caroli']:
        colors.append('#4CAF50')  # Rodents
        groups.append('Rodents')
    elif org in ['Bos taurus', 'Canis lupus dingo', 'Pteropus vampyrus', 'Balaenoptera acutorostrata']:
        colors.append('#FF9800')  # Other mammals
        groups.append('Other mammals')
    elif org in ['Gallus gallus', 'Taeniopygia guttata', 'Anser brachyrhynchus']:
        colors.append('#9C27B0')  # Birds
        groups.append('Birds')
    elif org in ['Oreochromis aureus']:
        colors.append('#F44336')  # Fish
        groups.append('Fish')
    else:
        colors.append('gray')
        groups.append('Other')

# Draw bars
for i, (y, org, status, color) in enumerate(zip(y_positions, species, gxsg_status, colors)):
    # All are "NO" catalytic GxSG
    ax.barh(y, 1, height=0.6, color='#FFCDD2', edgecolor='#C62828', linewidth=1)
    ax.text(1.05, y, f'{org}', va='center', fontsize=9, fontstyle='italic', color=color)
    ax.text(0.5, y, 'NO catalytic GxSG', va='center', ha='center', fontsize=8, 
           fontweight='bold', color='#C62828')
    
    # Add GxSG status detail
    ax.text(2.5, y, f'GxSG: {status}', va='center', fontsize=8, color='#616161')

# Reference: active rhomboid
ax.barh(-1.5, 1, height=0.6, color='#C8E6C9', edgecolor='#2E7D32', linewidth=2)
ax.text(1.05, -1.5, 'RHBDL2 (active rhomboid)', va='center', fontsize=9, 
       fontstyle='italic', color='#2E7D32', fontweight='bold')
ax.text(0.5, -1.5, 'GASG in TM4 ✓', va='center', ha='center', fontsize=8,
       fontweight='bold', color='#2E7D32')
ax.text(2.5, -1.5, 'Catalytic Ser + His PRESENT', va='center', fontsize=8, color='#2E7D32')

ax.set_xlim(-0.1, 4.5)
ax.set_ylim(-2.5, len(orthologs))
ax.set_yticks([])
ax.set_xticks([])

# Remove spines
for spine in ax.spines.values():
    spine.set_visible(False)

ax.set_title('UBAC2 Ortholog Conservation: Catalytic GxSG Motif in TM Regions\n'
            'ALL 25 orthologs lack catalytic residues — loss is ancestral (pre-vertebrate)',
            fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', pad=15)

# Add group labels
from matplotlib.patches import Patch
legend_elements = [
    Patch(facecolor='#1565C0', label='Primates'),
    Patch(facecolor='#4CAF50', label='Rodents'),
    Patch(facecolor='#FF9800', label='Other mammals'),
    Patch(facecolor='#9C27B0', label='Birds'),
    Patch(facecolor='#F44336', label='Fish'),
    Patch(facecolor='#FFCDD2', edgecolor='#C62828', label='No catalytic GxSG (pseudoprotease)'),
    Patch(facecolor='#C8E6C9', edgecolor='#2E7D32', label='Active protease (reference)'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower right', fontsize=8, framealpha=0.9)

# Add conclusion text box
textstr = ('Conclusion: UBAC2 has NEVER been a protease\n'
          'in any sequenced vertebrate species.\n'
          'Catalytic loss predates vertebrate radiation.')
props = dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#FFF3E0', edgecolor='#E65100', alpha=0.9)
ax.text(0.02, 0.02, textstr, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10,
       verticalalignment='bottom', bbox=props, fontweight='bold', color='#BF360C')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('ubac2_ortholog_conservation.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Ortholog conservation figure saved.")
